//_comment: Frappe's Workflow engine turns a DocType's plain 'status' Select field into an enforced state machine with role-gated transitions. This is normally built via the desk UI's Workflow builder (drag-and-drop states/transitions); shown here as the JSON it generates, which is also how you'd ship it as a fixture (see fixtures in hooks.py) so it installs automatically on any site that installs this app.
name: Maintenance Request Workflow

transitions.//_note: Any Employee (typically the assigned technician) can move a request from Open to In Progress.
Only a manager can formally close out a resolved request -- a simple approval gate, common in real ERP workflows (e.g. expense claims, leave approval).
